sourceMovie.title: Amores Perros
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Amores Perros works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 21 Grams
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Amores Perros clicked for you, 21 Grams (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Amores Perros?
faq.answer: Try 21 Grams, The Marksman, Elevator to the Gallows—each shares DNA with Amores Perros while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Amores Perros?
faq.answer: Amores Perros (2000) is best described as Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Amores Perros worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
